creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG

Author: beech
Date: Thu Mar 14 01:50:38 2013
New Revision: 314126
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/314126

Log:
  - Update to 1.2.1
  
  PR:		ports/176472
  Submitted by:	Linus Lee <csosstudy@gmail.com>
  Approved by:	Maintainer timeout

Modified:
  head/dns/dnscrypt-proxy/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/dns/dnscrypt-proxy/distinfo   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/dns/dnscrypt-proxy/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/dns/dnscrypt-proxy/Makefile	Thu Mar 14 01:25:06 2013	(r314125)
+++ head/dns/dnscrypt-proxy/Makefile	Thu Mar 14 01:50:38 2013	(r314126)
@@ -2,10 +2,9 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	dnscrypt-proxy
-PORTVERSION=	1.2.0
+PORTVERSION=	1.2.1
 CATEGORIES=	dns
-MASTER_SITES=	http://cloud.github.com/downloads/opendns/dnscrypt-proxy/ \
-		http://www.dns-lab.com/downloads/dnscrypt-proxy/
+MASTER_SITES=	http://download.dnscrypt.org/dnscrypt-proxy/
 
 MAINTAINER=	freebsd@dns-lab.com
 COMMENT=	Boost privacy and security of DNS
